arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha update given as Man Utd, Liverpool & Newcastle join Arsenal in race for Wolves man
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha will not try to ‘force’ his way out of Wolves this January, according to reports. The Brazilian forward has been in stunning form this season, with his goal against Manchester United on Boxing Day taking him to 10 goals and four assists in 18 Premier League appearances — only four players boast a […] The post Matheus Cunha update given as Man Utd, Liverpool & Newcastle join Arsenal in race for Wolves man appeared first on CaughtOffside.
